response: To cut out sugar from your daily diet, start by reading food labels and avoiding items with [added sugars]. Choose whole foods like fruits and vegetables instead of [sweetened snacks]. Drink water or herbal tea instead of sugary drinks. Gradually reduce sweeteners in your coffee or tea. Be mindful of hidden sugars in sauces and condiments. Replace desserts with healthy alternatives like yogurt or nuts. Track your progress to stay motivated. Make gradual changes for long-term success.
